'''Cirus II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] world for [[Syntonium crystal|syntonium]]. [[Lex]] was a mine operator there.

The [[Cargo hauler/Legends|cargo hauler]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Tem Chesko]] had visited Cirus II for his syntonium haul. He was later stranded in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] after an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] collided with his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], destroying his [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. He calculated 10 [[Parsec/Legends|parsecs]] to the nearest planet, which would be 32.6 [[Light-year/Legends|light-years]], and he would not arrive at anything in under sixty [[Standard year/Legends|years]].
